title: agrostis crinita
intro: Agrostis crinita, also known as hairy bent grass or hairy bog-grass, is a species of grass in the genus Agrostis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The health benefits of Agrostis crinita include its potential to alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds, as well as its antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Agrostis crinita can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or by using it as a tincture, but further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
